items.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall; Trump Tariffs, Government Shutdown, Big Earnings In Focus
items.description: President Donald Trump threatened a 100% tariff on Canada. Government shutdown risks soared. Tesla, Microsoft, Meta, Apple learnings loom.

items.title: Stock Futures Are Falling Ahead of Fed Meeting as Shutdown Fears Rise
items.description: Investors are looking forward to a busy week of earnings, including one-fifth of the S&P 500 companies, and four of the Magnificent Seven stocks reporting results this week.

items.title: Dow Jones Futures Due With Trump Tariffs, Government Shutdown, Big Earnings In Focus
items.description: President Donald Trump threatened a 100% tariff on Canada. Government shutdown risks soared. Tesla, Microsoft, Meta, Apple learnings loom.

items.title: Fed Meeting, Apple, Meta, GM, Boeing, Chevron, and More to Watch This Week
items.description: A big week for earnings will see reports from Microsoft, Exxon, Visa, GE Vernova, and many more. The Fed is expected to keep rates steady, as Jerome Powell closes out his final months as Chair.

items.title: Earnings, Tariffs and Other Key Things to Watch this Week
items.description: Markets face one of the most consequential weeks of 2026 with an extraordinary convergence of events including Wednesday's Federal Reserve meeting at 2:00pm, multiple speeches by President Trump on Tuesday and Wednesday, and a blockbuster earnings lineup featuring mega-cap technology giants.
